caption: The video consists of a solid black background featuring four identical orange circles, each containing a white capital letter "S". The circles are positioned in a symmetrical layout, with one in each quadrant of the screen. Additionally, the text "Susan Nirmal" appears in a small, white font in four different locations: twice on the left side and twice on the right side, centered vertically between the top and bottom orange circles. Throughout the sequence, there is no movement, change in color, or modification of the elements. The people, objects, and setting are non-existent, as the imagery is limited to these static graphic elements and the quoted text "Susan Nirmal" against a void of black space. The scene remains perfectly still across all frames.
